SEARCH
Package kp.company.controller

Class DepartmentController

java.lang.Object
kp.company.controller.DepartmentController
@RestController @RequestMapping("/company") public class DepartmentController extends Object
The HATEOAS RESTful web service controller for the Department.

    Description

    Creates a new Department

    Deletes the Department with given id.

    Reads all Departments.

    Reads the Department with given id.

  • Method Details

    • createDepartment

      @PostMapping("/departments") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<org.springframework.hateoas.EntityModel<Department>> createDepartment(@RequestBody Optional<Department> departmentOpt)
      Creates a new Department
      Parameters:
      departmentOpt - the Optional with the Department
      Returns:
      the ResponseEntity with the EntityModel for the Department

    • findDepartmentById

      @GetMapping("/departments/{id}") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<org.springframework.hateoas.EntityModel<Department>> findDepartmentById(@PathVariable("id") Optional<Long> idOpt)
      Reads the Department with given id.
      Parameters:
      idOpt - the Optional with the Department id
      Returns:
      the ResponseEntity with the EntityModel for the Department

    • findAllDepartments

      @GetMapping("/departments") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<org.springframework.hateoas.CollectionModel<org.springframework.hateoas.EntityModel<Department>>> findAllDepartments()
      Reads all Departments.
      Returns:
      the ResponseEntity with the CollectionModel

    • updateDepartment

      @PatchMapping("/departments/{id}") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<org.springframework.hateoas.EntityModel<Department>> updateDepartment(@RequestBody Optional<Department> departmentOpt, @PathVariable("id") Optional<Long> idOpt)
      Updates the Department with given id.
      Parameters:
      departmentOpt - the Optional with the Department
      idOpt - the Optional with the Department id
      Returns:
      the ResponseEntity with the EntityModel for the Department

    • deleteDepartment

      @DeleteMapping("/departments/{id}") public org.springframework.http.ResponseEntity<org.springframework.hateoas.EntityModel<Department>> deleteDepartment(@PathVariable("id") Optional<Long> idOpt)
      Deletes the Department with given id.
      Parameters:
      idOpt - the Optional with the Department id
      Returns:
      the ResponseEntity
